since_last: 88% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.44%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 88% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.28% · Gold -1.74% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 88% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.44%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.44%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: EQIX is the standout at -9.94%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +9.07%, MRVL +5.62%, DV +5.11%, LRCX +4.76%, ARM +4.68%. Laggards: EQIX -9.94%, BABA -0.88%, ROK -0.33%, ZS -0.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.03% at $193.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
